name: Granite Point Mortgage Trust Inc. 7.00% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Granite Point Mortgage Trust Inc. 7.00% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a preferred stock issued by Granite Point Mortgage Trust Inc., a real estate investment trust (REIT). It pays a fixed dividend rate that may float in the future and has preference over common stock. The company is headquartered in New York.
